heading: Clauses prohibiting certain sales, transportation, and commingling
label: 3374 Clauses prohibiting certain sales, transportation, and commingling

children.text: prohibits the commingling of natural gas subject to such contract with natural gas subject to the jurisdiction of the Commission under the provisions of the Natural Gas Act [ et seq.];15 U.S.C. 717

prohibits the sale of any natural gas subject to such contract to, or transportation of any such natural gas by, any person subject to the jurisdiction of the Commission under the Natural Gas Act [ et seq.], or otherwise prohibits the sale or transportation in interstate commerce (within the meaning of the Natural Gas Act) of natural gas subject to such contract; or15 U.S.C. 717
terminates, or grants any party the option to terminate, any obligation under any such contract as a result of such commingling, sale, or transportation.
